subject: code coverage for ccsdk sliapi DG nodes
commit_message:
code coverage for ccsdk sliapi DG nodes

Coverage improvement for SqlResourcePropertiesProviderImpl
https://jira.onap.org/browse/CCSDK-213?jql=project%20%3D%20CCSDK%20AND%20text%20~%20coverage

Issue-ID: CCSDK-213
Change-Id: I97712ceade017e9802ef4a7d29b2d19561550134
Signed-off-by: prakash.e <prakash.e@huawei.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

Thanks, but this code does not test any additional lines or branches in sliapi.  If the additional code that would be executed is in sli/provider, which already has unit test cases for the nodes you added.  Even if it didn't, it turns out that the sonar/jacoco scans only give us credit for tests within the scope of a particular pom.xml (i.e. I found that when I was testing sli/common and sli/provider ... adding test cases to sli/provider that executed additional lines in sli/common didn't show those sli/common lines as covered in Sonar)
